title: SonicWall Application Control Policy Violations (SonicWall)
dataSources: `sourcetype=dell:sonicwall:firewall` App Control with application name fields
spl:
index=netfw sourcetype="dell:sonicwall:firewall" earliest=-7d
| where match(_raw,"(?i)AppCtrl|application control")
| stats count by app_name, usr, fw_action
| sort -count
description: Application awareness stops unsanctioned remote-access tools and crypto miners. Violation trending shows policy effectiveness.
value: Supports zero-trust application allow-listing initiatives with measurable metrics.
implementation: Map SonicWall application IDs to names. Exclude approved IT tools via lookup.

references.title: Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk
Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference

grandmaExplanation: Application awareness stops unsanctioned remote-access tools and crypto miners — we monitor SonicWall logs so teams can act before users feel pain.
